name: Skirley
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat dripping until smoking hot.
2. Fry onion in the dripping until it becomes pale brown in color.
3. Add oatmeal, salt, and pepper to the onion.
4. Mix everything well together.
5. Continue cooking on low heat with the lid on for about 15 minutes.
6. Serve hot with mashed potatoes.
